name: 19oz 6pk Hutton Pint Glasses - Threshold™
description:
This 6-Pack of 19-Ounce Hutton Pint Glasses from Threshold™ is a must-have for casual entertaining. Made from clear glass, these 19-ounce pint glasses are perfect for serving beer and other cold beverages. You get six of these pint glasses in each pack, and they can be tossed in the dishwasher after use for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
